name: Median Calculator
description: Calculate median of a data set.
seo_description: Use our free median calculator to quickly estimate median, sorted based on values. No registration needed.
result_context: The median {median} is the middle value when data is sorted: {sorted}.
formula_display: Median = middle value (or average of two middle values for even n)
mistakes: Not sorting the data before finding median
Using mean instead of median for skewed distributions
Incorrectly averaging middle two for even-sized datasets
desc: Free online median calculator. Enter comma-separated values to get instant results.
